title: East Blue Cleared
safeRecap: Your crew came together one member at a time — a swordsman, a navigator, a sharpshooter, a cook — and set sail for the Grand Line.

title: Alabasta Survived
safeRecap: You crossed a desert kingdom on the brink of war and watched a hard-won vow get carved into the sand.

title: Skies Charted
safeRecap: You climbed above the clouds to an island in the heavens and heard a bell ring out across the centuries.

title: Water 7 Weathered
safeRecap: You weathered a city of canals, a painful misunderstanding among friends, and a fight that proved a flag will not fall.

title: Thriller Bark Braved
safeRecap: You made it through a long night of fog aboard a ghost ship the size of an island — and met a new face hiding behind a song.

title: Into the Wider World
safeRecap: You sailed past the calm of the first half of the Grand Line and into a far harsher, wider sea.

title: Land of Samurai
safeRecap: You reached a faraway, sealed land of samurai where a storm long in the making finally broke.
